payload.answer: Committed the supported facts: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans, lately more early Coltrane.
citations: Daniele - Still at Goldman? Sam - No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72
Daniele - Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam - Yes, but lately more early Coltrane

Sam said he is still listening to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane.

details: Stored employment change with clear supersession of prior Goldman status.

Did not promote the AI-infra discussion to durable memory.

repair_options: If needed, create a separate contact preference note for Sam about jazz listening habits.
